title: NSEC Entrepreneurship Development Cell
about: The Entrepreneurship Development Cell (EDC) was established in 2009 to nurture entrepreneurial thinking among students.
It aims to build an entrepreneurial ecosystem by supporting idea validation, product development, patenting, funding, and venture creation.
The cell promotes innovation through training, mentorship, and collaboration with external organizations.
initiatives: Incubation centre for transforming ideas into fundable startups
Faculty development through training programs with NEN and other networks
Collaboration with Confederation of Indian Industries (CII)
MOU with Electrixa Energy and Lighting Pvt. Ltd. for incubation infrastructure
LED lighting assembly and testing unit setup within campus
announcements: Inviting ideas, proposals, prototypes, and projects for AICTE Chatra Viswakarma Award and other competitions
Online selection test for D2C Entrepreneurship Course by Wadhwani Foundation
